title: Funstuffs
description: The Funstuffs mod adds a collection of items that i made
body:
The funstuffs mod is a fabric mod for 1.21.1
I have taken a break from working on this mod, so dont expect any updates coming soon # What is the mod about? The funstuffs mod is a mod that adds a collection of little gizmos and gadgets such as throwable ketchup packets. # Who is this for? This mod is for people who want random silly items to play with. # Current Added Items - Throwable Ketchup Packet - Throwable Bomb - Keycard with editable data (No way of setting the data without commands yet tho) - Uno Reverse (Only used in recipes right now, I plan to change this) - Tomato - Rubots - Normal Rubot that instamines
